_comment: Curated market data for Beacon. All research URLs and statistics verified from Modo Energy published content. Sambhav can extend or verify these before the demo.

poland.name: Poland
poland.tagline: From 28 MW to 8-9 GW by 2030. Europe's fastest-growing BESS market.

modo_research.title: Poland's battery energy storage buildout outlook
modo_research.summary: Modo projects operational utility-scale BESS in Poland could reach 8-9 GW by 2030, up from 28 MW today, driven by 89 projects totaling 12.5 GW and €1B+ in state subsidies. Capacity-market auctions between 2022 and 2025 contracted 5.1 GW of deliverable BESS capacity.
key_stats: 5.1 GW contracted across four capacity auctions

modo_research.title: Poland's BESS investment case is shifting from capacity-backed to merchant-led
modo_research.summary: Poland's investment thesis evolving as capacity market saturates. Merchant revenue opportunity expanding.

active_signals.headline: UC84 Grid Act enforces 30-month permit window
active_signals.so_what: Developers holding grid connection agreements face imminent risk of losing them. Creates urgency for any tool that helps project selection and optimization.

active_signals.headline: Fourth capacity market auction contracted ~1.2 GW of BESS
active_signals.so_what: Winners need to validate revenue assumptions against regulated benchmarks. Modo's methodology framework is directly relevant even before Poland-specific indices exist.

active_signals.headline: 110 kV substation capacity constraints across Mazovia and Silesia
active_signals.so_what: Cable pooling regulations create a technical-depth moat for any data provider who can map constraints.

prospect_archetypes.description: Developer that won capacity in the 2024 or 2025 auction, now racing the 30-month permit clock
prospect_archetypes.trigger: Public capacity market registry showing recent allocation
prospect_archetypes.pain: Needs to validate that their revenue model holds as capacity prices compress in later auctions

prospect_archetypes.description: Developer with 100-500 MW pipeline facing substation constraints
prospect_archetypes.trigger: Public grid connection queue data showing stalled projects
prospect_archetypes.pain: Needs cable pooling intelligence and substation risk mapping
prospect_archetypes.channel: Direct email with constraint dashboard preview

prospect_archetypes.description: European infrastructure fund making first Polish BESS commitment
prospect_archetypes.trigger: Fund press release mentioning CEE or Polish energy transition
prospect_archetypes.pain: Needs bankable revenue forecasts and a regulated benchmark to reference in LP reporting

prospect_archetypes.archetype: Optimiser expanding from GB/DE to Poland
prospect_archetypes.trigger: LinkedIn hiring signal — trader or analyst role based in Warsaw
prospect_archetypes.pain: Needs historical merchant price shape data and comparable market analogues

prospect_archetypes.archetype: Utility with legacy coal retiring into BESS
prospect_archetypes.description: Large Polish utility converting coal sites to BESS
prospect_archetypes.pain: Strategic diversification with no internal benchmarking capability
prospect_archetypes.channel: Conference intro at enerG Expo Poland

ko_starter_prompts.text: What's the expected clearing price trajectory for Poland's capacity market auctions between 2026 and 2030, and how does that compare to the UK T-4 auctions over the same horizon?
ko_starter_prompts.why: Developers need to stress-test revenue assumptions. Ko surfaces both Modo's Poland-specific outlook and comparable UK dynamics.

ko_starter_prompts.text: Which Polish voivodeships have the tightest 110 kV substation capacity, and where are cable pooling regulations most likely to constrain new BESS projects?
ko_starter_prompts.why: Direct response to the grid constraint pain. Answers the specific question developers cannot answer from public data alone.

ko_starter_prompts.text: How do day-ahead price spreads in Poland compare to Germany over the last twelve months, and what does that imply for two-hour BESS revenue in 2026-2027?
ko_starter_prompts.why: Comparative market analysis that only Modo can do credibly because of regulated benchmarks.

ko_starter_prompts.text: For a Polish 50 MW / 100 MWh BESS project coming online in Q3 2026, what's the most credible merchant revenue forecast under low, central, and high scenarios?
ko_starter_prompts.why: Forecasting question with scenario structure — exactly what infrastructure funds need for IC decks.

key_dates.note: First wave of UC84 deadlines hits

germany.name: Germany
germany.tagline: The capacity pipeline is there. The grid connection process just changed.

market_snapshot.grid_forming_mandatory_timeline: Emerging — paid in new projects, likely mandatory by 2027-2028
market_snapshot.market_maturity: Bankable routes to market now established

modo_research.title: How to apply for transmission grid connection under Germany's new Reifegradverfahren
modo_research.summary: Germany's new grid connection process — Reifegradverfahren — changes how developers secure connection. Modo's guide explains eligibility, documentation, and timing.

modo_research.title: German BESS investment outlook Q1 2026: Bankable routes to market
modo_research.summary: Quarterly outlook distilling bankable revenue routes for German BESS. Covers wholesale, aFRR, and capacity mechanisms.
key_stats: aFRR a primary early revenue stream
Wholesale arbitrage scaling as spreads widen

active_signals.headline: Reifegradverfahren changes grid connection application process
active_signals.so_what: Every developer with a connection application in flight needs to recalibrate. Creates an education opportunity and a content hook.

active_signals.headline: Grid-forming BESS now paid as distinct product category
active_signals.so_what: Developers with technology choices still open need to understand the ROI of grid-forming inverters. Modo's research is ahead of the market here.

active_signals.headline: Multiple German BESS financings closed in H2 2025 and Q1 2026
active_signals.so_what: Debt market opening for German BESS. Funds looking to deploy need credible forecasts.

prospect_archetypes.description: Mid-size German BESS developer with connection applications in flight
prospect_archetypes.trigger: Recent connection application submissions under old or new regime
prospect_archetypes.pain: Uncertainty about new process eligibility and documentation

prospect_archetypes.archetype: European fund allocating to DACH BESS
prospect_archetypes.description: Fund with German mandate, building first BESS position
prospect_archetypes.trigger: LP commitment announcements or fund strategy updates mentioning storage
prospect_archetypes.pain: Needs bankable forecasts aligned with German market structure

prospect_archetypes.archetype: Stadtwerke or utility building BESS pipeline
prospect_archetypes.description: Municipal utility or mid-size utility developing first BESS assets
prospect_archetypes.pain: Strategic entry, needs independent data provider

prospect_archetypes.description: Optimiser building or scaling aFRR capability

ko_starter_prompts.text: What are the documentation requirements under Germany's new Reifegradverfahren for a 100 MW BESS project, and how does the timeline compare to the previous process?
ko_starter_prompts.why: Hyper-specific to the newest regulatory change. Exactly the question developers are trying to answer right now.

ko_starter_prompts.text: How have German aFRR capacity prices evolved over the last twelve months, and what's the expected saturation timeline given the pipeline of BESS capacity?
ko_starter_prompts.why: Quantitative, forward-looking, requires Modo's proprietary aFRR price data.

ko_starter_prompts.text: Compare grid-forming versus grid-following BESS revenue stacks in Germany over a 10-year asset life.
ko_starter_prompts.why: Technology-choice question with direct capex implications.

spain.name: Spain
spain.tagline: The intraday market question is live. The algorithmic trading opportunity depends on the answer.

market_snapshot.key_question: Does the intraday continuous market have enough liquidity for algorithmic trading?

modo_research.title: Does Spain's intraday continuous market have enough liquidity to support algorithmic trading?
modo_research.summary: Analyses liquidity conditions in Spanish continuous intraday market. Directly addresses the critical question for algorithmic BESS trading strategies.

modo_research.title: Has Spain decoupled from natural gas?
modo_research.summary: CCGTs increasingly absent from day-ahead, but technical restrictions market creates opportunity for BESS.
key_stats: Technical restrictions cost passed to consumers

active_signals.headline: Intraday continuous liquidity question becoming investable thesis
active_signals.so_what: Traders and optimisers need a definitive answer before scaling algo desks. First-mover advantage for any data provider that publishes clearly.

active_signals.headline: Solar capture rates falling sharply as cannibalisation accelerates
active_signals.so_what: Co-located BESS economics shifting. Modo's analysis is in-demand.

prospect_archetypes.archetype: Iberian algo trader expanding BESS exposure
prospect_archetypes.description: Proprietary or bank-backed trader building Spanish BESS trading capability
prospect_archetypes.trigger: Hiring for Madrid-based BESS desk roles
prospect_archetypes.pain: Cannot commit capital without liquidity certainty

prospect_archetypes.description: Large Spanish solar developer facing cannibalisation risk
prospect_archetypes.trigger: New project announcements combining solar + storage
prospect_archetypes.channel: Warm intro via solar trade association

prospect_archetypes.archetype: Optimiser moving from technical restrictions to continuous
prospect_archetypes.description: Iberian optimiser with CCGT expertise now targeting BESS
prospect_archetypes.pain: Strategy transition requires new data stack

ko_starter_prompts.text: What's the depth and concentration of liquidity in Spain's intraday continuous market across different times of day, and how does that shape algorithmic trading viability for a 100 MW BESS?
ko_starter_prompts.why: Direct response to the liquidity thesis question. Ko can synthesise across Modo's published analysis.

ko_starter_prompts.text: How does co-located solar plus storage economics compare to standalone BESS in Spain given current capture rate trends?

italy.name: Italy
italy.tagline: MACSE auctions defined the capacity piece. Merchant tail is the open question.

modo_research.title: Italian BESS market analysis
modo_research.summary: Modo research on Italy's structured capacity market and merchant evolution.

active_signals.headline: MACSE auction results reshape developer economics
active_signals.so_what: Capacity allocations now locked. Developers need to model merchant tail to justify full project economics.

prospect_archetypes.description: Developer with capacity allocation needing merchant revenue forecast
prospect_archetypes.pain: Project IRR depends on merchant piece; no internal forecast capability

prospect_archetypes.description: Fund with Italian mandate targeting BESS

ko_starter_prompts.text: For a MACSE-winning 50 MW BESS in Italy, what's the expected merchant revenue contribution over the 2026-2030 period under central assumptions?
ko_starter_prompts.why: The MACSE tail question is the single most important unknown in Italian BESS economics.

france.name: France
france.tagline: The solar CfD redesign reshapes co-located battery economics.

market_snapshot.regulatory_change: Solar CfD redesign to incentivise co-located batteries
market_snapshot.mechanism_shift: Reference price switch transfers cannibalisation risk to developers

modo_research.title: France's solar CfD redesign and co-located battery economics
modo_research.summary: CRE redesigning solar CfD to incentivise co-located storage. Reference price change shifts cannibalisation risk to developers. Germany's hybrid tender offers precedent.

active_signals.headline: CRE confirms CfD redesign parameters
active_signals.so_what: Every French solar developer now has to model co-located storage to stay competitive in upcoming tenders.

prospect_archetypes.archetype: French solar developer forced to consider co-location
prospect_archetypes.description: Mid-to-large solar developer modelling first BESS attachment
prospect_archetypes.channel: Direct email with co-location ROI template

ko_starter_prompts.text: Under France's redesigned solar CfD, what's the expected revenue uplift from co-locating a 20 MW battery with a 100 MW solar project?
ko_starter_prompts.why: Specific, quantitative, critical for winning the next CRE tender.
